attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider using GC positioning or post-GC abandonment; capable of final-kilometer accelerations when form is good, but rarely sustains prolonged climbing attacks against pure climbers.
team_tactics: Functions as GC co-leader with heavy TTT contribution and domestique pulls, but shows vulnerability when isolated without team support on climbs and technical descents.
terrain_preference: Time trials clearly his strength (leading team TTT, top-10 TT finishes); struggles on sustained steep gradients and technical descents when isolated. Performs best on shorter, punchy climbs.
vulnerability: Dropped early on category climbs under high pace (4+ observations at 7-34km to go); crash-prone in critical moments (3 documented crashes losing time/causing abandonment); fragile form when isolated without teammates.
key_patterns: Repeatedly dropped on sustained climbs before final kilometers: 34km, penultimate climbs, steep gradients (5 instances)
Crash incidents at critical race moments causing time loss or abandonment (4 separate crashes documented)
Strong time trial capabilities contrasting with declining GC climbing ability (TT top-10s vs climb struggles)
Uses breakaway tactics when GC ambitions fade or to leverage nominal GC position
Shows vulnerability when isolated without team support on technical terrain (descents, climbs)
Form fragility: early-season abandonments and inconsistent preparation races (Dauphine struggles, Paris-Nice abandon)
form_trajectory: negative: 2020 observations show consistent early drops on climbs in preparation races and Tour, inability to match climber pace, suggesting continued decline from earlier GC ambitions
